title: Leeds Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is hitting Leeds with a Z-Score of -3.09. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Leeds are extremely cold, with a significant impact on daily life. 
 The city is experiencing a high level of humidity at 79% and moderate winds of 9.4 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) are at 11.8 GG, indicating a high energy demand for heating.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
